name: TEDDY-XMD v2.0
description: Advanced WhatsApp Bot with Web Panel, Session Manager, Auto Join/Follow

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number without + or spaces

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string from MongoDB Atlas

SESSION_B64.description: Optional: TEDDY-XMD~ session string. Leave empty to pair with phone

scripts.postdeploy: echo 'TEDDY-XMD deployed! Open app to pair.'
